name: Create a meta thread, without a review request
about: For use by APA chairs and staff to set up the discussion space for reviewers

This issue provides a space for reviewers to discuss a spec for which a review has *not yet* been requested - the spec is:

REPLACE_WITH_URL_OF_SPEC

Any issues that you find, that you think APA WG should raise, should be proposed separately, following the [steps to propose an issue, in the APA wiki](https://www.w3.org/WAI/APA/wiki/Horizontal_Review#For_Specifications_2).

Please ping the chairs (preferably via email) if you have any questions/concerns about the process - we aim to make continual improvements.
